title: Connect Google Drive to Claude (Step-by-Step Guide)
summary: A tutorial demonstrating how to connect Google Drive to Claude using connectors, enabling Claude to access files directly without re-uploading and to process queries on file contents. The guide covers linking Google Drive, granting access, and using Claude to summarize and generate content from stored files.
